creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi portmgr@,

I've updated both patches. Please run two exp-runs. The first one with the hiemdal private patch applied and the second without the patch applied. Both need the ports patch applied. The one without having heimdal private can be run on FreeBSD HEAD or against FreeBSD-11.

The ports patch is designed to work with FreeBSD systems with private heimdal (probably FreeBSD-13) and on earlier systems.

Thank you for running this for me.
